title: 300 Metal Drawing Push Pins, Brass Thumb Tacks for Notice Boards, Art and Crafts, Work/Office, Map Marking and More (300 Drawing Pins)
features: 📌📌📌 300 DRAWING PINS FOR HOME SCHOOL AND OFFICE – Ideal multipurpose drawing pins great for marking maps, pinning items to notice boards, hanging light items such as lights, Art and Crafts
📌📌📌 SMOOTH HEAD & STRONG PIN -The smooth strong surface of these drawing pins protect your thumbs when pushing the pins into surfaces, making them more comfortable to use and last longer
📌📌📌 REUSEABLE DRAWING PINS – Due to the strong, durable nature of these pins they can be used and recycled continually of a long period of time so that you don’t have to keep replacing them

📌📌📌 PERFECT FOR BOTH STUDENTS AND PROFESSIONALS - Great space savers. These small pins are lightweight and portable so you can pop them into your bag, toolkit or desk tidy and they won’t take up much space
📌📌📌 300 METAL DRAWING PINS - This box contains 300 metal drawing pins
description: Product Description Easy To Apply These notice board pins are designed with a sharp point that allows them to easily slide into a wide variety of surfaces with ease. Secure Hold Once applied the pin tacks will firmly secure your important notice or documents in place without you having to worry about them falling to the floor. Ample Supply This pack includes 300 drawing pins for walls meaning you have a more than ample supply to pin notices at your workplace and home. Professional Finish Unlike plastic pins these metal heavy duty drawing pins have a professional which ensures they don't look out of place in a work setting. Gold Coloured Drawing Pins The sleek golden design of our drawing push pins adds a touch of class to any setting. The metallic finish not only enhances their visual appeal but also complements a wide range of décor styles. Upgrade your workspace aesthetics with these stylish and functional thumb tacks. These push pins are not just practical; they're also versatile. Ideal for artists and crafters, they provide a reliable way to showcase your latest creations on a corkboard or canvas. With their user-friendly design, you can effortlessly switch out artwork or documents without causing damage to your work or the pins.
